pages.raw_text:
The league will hold it's regular
meetings on the first Wednesday Of
each month. Semi-annual meetings
Will be held during the month Of
January and July.


The first petition Of the newly or.
ganized league will be presented to
the city council at the next meeting
Of that body on July II.


The petition asks that the city
fathers at once take steps to utilize
a sufficient portion Of the water be-
longing to the city and which is now
going to waste for the purpose of in
stalling and operating an electric
lighting plant for lighting the public
streets and city buildings and to fur
nish light for private residents in
the city


President Winfree. in speaking Of
the purposes of the league, stated to
a representative Of The Press this
morning that the league would take
up the question of municipal owner
ship of other public utilities as soon
as the matter now before the body
was brought to a settlement.


1T Is our purpose to have the city
gas, electric light, city water and
street railways controlled by the PEG.
pie whose money will be paid out for
Its support Under this state Of at
fairs the voice of the public will rule
and all attempts to overrun the PEG.
pie will be at an end


The election of the officers OF the
league will take place at the regular
semi-annual meetings.
